message:
fix(tui): add list pane scroll tracking so cursor stays visible

The list pane rendered its content as a Paragraph with no .scroll()
offset, so pressing j/k moved the cursor beyond visible rows while
the text stayed fixed. Add a Cell<usize> scroll offset that is
computed at render time by locating the '>' cursor marker in the
generated text and ensuring it stays within the visible viewport.
The offset resets on mode switches, filter changes, and Home key.

Closes #2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
